content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Collecting Coins". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1294/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and x. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of moves required to collect all coins.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a greedy algorithm to always move to the cell with the most coins.

code.Python3:
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    n, x = map(int, input().split())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    moves = 0
    while x < n:
        x += a[x]
        moves += 1
    print(moves)
